rights_holder: Photograph by Jack Delano (1914–1997) on assignment for the U.S. Farm Security Administration — public domain as a work of a U.S. federal employee
attribution: Jack Delano, "Mr. and Mrs. Andrew Lyman, Polish tobacco farmers near Windsor Locks, Connecticut." September 1940. Library of Congress, Prints and Photographs Division (digital ID ppmsc.00255). PD-US-GOV (FSA/OWI).
subject: Jack Delano's FSA work. Delano contributed one plate to The Family of Man (#140 in the 1955 Master Checklist; our photo-0134, a Section 14 'Land' plate also Farm-Security-Administration-attributed). Plate-level identification of this specific image with our photo-0134 has not been verified against a Tier-1 source as of 2026-04-25; this image is offered as a representative example of Delano's FSA work.
